creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jason,

I found the time to build a new shar file for testing

Parts I have changed.
- use the ports build steps
- add custom DOS2UNIX since we should avoid patches with dos line-breaks
- remove OPTION MYSQL (it is the only database at the moment)
- remove DB and tomcat check in pre-build
- check for $tomcat/bin/bootstrap.jar instead tomcat>5.5.30:$...
- replace "${CP} file && chmod" with "${INSTALL} -m"

However I cannot guarantee the port will be committed because of
the maven build. I already started a discussion about this issue
with other committers. It seems no issue for you, but in general
such builds are prohibited since they fetch files out of the fetch
phase and spam ~/.

The new shar file can be found here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR150208_jasperserver_b3.shar
(contains some of the changes only as comment)
